results.rendered_html:
guṣpita partic. verflochten, verschlungen: api vṛśca purāṇavadvratateriva guṣpitam  ṚV. 8,40,6 . viṣāṇe vi ṣya guṣpitaṃ yadasya kṣetriyaṃ hṛdi  AV. 3,7,2 . aṃhasa iva hyetā muñcanti yadudare guṣpitaṃ (so zu lesen st. guṣṭitaṃ) bhavati  ŚAT. BR. 3,2,2,20 .
— Vgl. guph, gumph.
